title: Add per-element empty-string validation to all /get and blob_lookup methods
description: 9 methods accept id arrays but only validate array-level non-empty, not per-element: chat_get, chat_contact_get, custom_emoji_get, read_position_get, space_get, space_ban_get, space_invite_get (all Option<&[&str]> with no check), plus message_get and blob_lookup (&[&str] with is_empty() check but no per-element check). All destroy methods were already fixed; /get methods were missed.
